name: clean-compliance
description: A pricing page with both an FTC-compliant savings claim (named competitor, methodology, source link) and TCPA-compliant phone-capture disclosure. Compliance must return zero findings — calibration against false positives.

page.purpose: Public pricing page with optional callback request.
page.userFunction: Visitor evaluates plans and optionally requests a sales callback.

matchedRules.description: Forms collecting a phone number for marketing SMS or autodialed calls MUST display an express written consent disclosure adjacent to the submit control.
Quantified savings claims MUST be substantiated by a clear basis disclosed on the same page.
